name: Lightstone Value Plus REIT IV, Inc.
business: Lightstone Value Plus REIT IV, Inc. invests primarily in real estate and real estate-related investments, including operating properties and development projects. As of December 31, 2025, its consolidated portfolio consists of a 75% interest in the Williamsburg Moxy Hotel, a 216-room Marriott-branded hotel, and an unconsolidated 33.3% interest in the 40 East End Ave. condominium project. The company generates revenue from hotel operations (room revenue and food, beverage, and other revenue) and condominium sales.

exposures.sentence: The Williamsburg Moxy Hotel Joint Venture owns a 216-room Marriott branded hotel (the Williamsburg Moxy Hotel) located in the Williamsburg neighborhood of Brooklyn in New York City, which it developed, constructed and opened on March 7, 2023.

The 40 East End Ave. Joint Venture, through affiliates, developed and constructed a luxury residential 29-unit condominium project located at the corner of 81st Street and East End Avenue in the Upper East Side neighborhood of Manhattan in New York City.

catalysts.event: Sale of one remaining condominium unit at 40 East End Ave. Project
catalysts.sentence: One of the remaining unsold condominium units was sold during February 2026.
